message:
fix(codegen): Universal fixes for core3 test compilation (Phase 5)

Priority 1: Add primitive int method dispatch
- Handle __index__(), __int__(), __hash__() on int/bool primitives
- Return self for ints, convert bool to int via @intFromBool
- Prevents invalid obj.__index__() calls on Zig primitives

Priority 2: Fix list.extend() for list literals with custom iterables
- Handle [].extend(CustomIterable()) edge case in genExtend
- Add extend() handling in assertRaises context in assertions.zig
- Export listExtendIterable runtime helper
- Handle error union vs non-error __iter__ return types

Additional: Reduce monomorphization in list literals
- Extract type casting logic to runtime.list_ops module
- Use appendCast helper instead of inline type checks

All fixes are pattern-based and apply universally across the codebase.
